name: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Max
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Max
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Max – Compact Gateway with UniFi OS
short_description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 at 1.5 GHz, 3 GB RAM, 5x 2.5 Gbps RJ45, USB Type-C, RouterOS L4
description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 at 1.5 GHz, 3 GB RAM, 5x 2.5 Gbps RJ45, USB Type-C, RouterOS L4

detailed_description.heading: Powerful Network Management
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Cloud Gateway Max (UCG-Max) is a high-performance network gateway designed to streamline and optimize your network infrastructure. This compact and versatile device offers a robust set of features to manage and secure your network environment, catering to the needs of small to medium-sized businesses and enterprises. Equipped with a powerful processor and ample memory, the UCG-Max delivers exceptional performance and responsiveness. It supports up to 30 UniFi devices and over 300 clients, ensuring smooth network operation even under heavy load. The gateway also features advanced firewall capabilities and intrusion detection/prevention (IDS/IPS) to safeguard your network from cyber threats.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Integration and Centralized Management
detailed_description.text: The UCG-Max seamlessly integrates with the UniFi Network application, providing centralized management for all your UniFi devices. This unified platform allows you to monitor network performance, configure settings, and troubleshoot issues with ease. The UCG-Max also supports a wide range of networking protocols and standards, ensuring compatibility with existing network infrastructure. With its built-in storage, the UCG-Max offers flexible options for data retention and backup. The included 512GB NVMe SSD provides ample space for storing network logs, configuration files, and other critical data. Additionally, the gateway supports NVR functionality, allowing you to record and store video footage from compatible UniFi cameras, providing a comprehensive security solution.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Security and Performance
detailed_description.text: The UCG-Max prioritizes network security with advanced features like firewall rules, intrusion detection, and VPN support. The gateway's ability to identify and block malicious traffic helps protect your network from cyber threats. Furthermore, the UCG-Max offers application-aware firewall rules, allowing you to control network access based on specific applications and users. The UCG-Max delivers exceptional performance with its high-speed networking capabilities. With four 1/2.5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, the gateway supports various network topologies and devices. Additionally, the UCG-Max features multi-WAN load balancing to ensure uninterrupted network access by distributing traffic across multiple internet connections.
